text: Maintain optional provider-neutral payment-instrument and cardholder attribution as canonical dimensions when they affect matching, pool assignment, or reporting. Evidence: direct — the accepted system context requires Hermes to map provider wording to stable Tally identities; workflow UC-LEDGER-017.
target: The owner can create, inspect, archive, assign, and correct stable instrument/cardholder attribution without storing full card numbers or deriving it from description; absent attribution remains explicit and historical attribution remains inspectable.
